name: Olive Garden Fettuccine Assortito
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Yellow squash, sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the Fontina cheese sauce: In a heavy non-aluminum pot, melt butter, add all-purpose flour and cook on moderate heat for 2 minutes, stirring constantly with a wire whisk.
2. Add milk and bring just barely to the boiling point. Turn off the heat and stir in Fontina cheese, adjusting salt and pepper as needed.
3. In a large, heavy skillet over medium heat, melt butter or margarine and olive oil. Saute the veggies and ham until crisp tender, stirring frequently.
4. Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet with the sauteed vegetables and ham. Add the hot sauce and stir again to coat all ingredients evenly.
5. Serve with grated Parmesan at the table.
